title: TRANS HEALTH - 211info
text: NUNM HEALTH CENTER LAIR HILL TRANS HEALTH Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a community clinic using naturopathic practices. Doctors are prepared to support those in transition with ongoing general care, including hormone therapy. 3025 S Corbett Avenue Portland, OR 97201 Eligibility: Individuals who identify as transgender or non-binary Hours: Monday 10:30am-5:30pm, Tuesday-Thursday 7:30am-5:30pm, Friday 11:30pm-5:30pm, Saturday 8:30am-12:30pm (503) 552-1551 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Scheduling Line (503) 552-1551 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Varies by insurance. Reduced fees are available for individuals who are uninsured DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: Interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: State of Oregon TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Clinic parking available on S Porter Street Trimet North-bound Bus Lines : 38,45,54,55 stop #1930 (SW Naito Parkway & Hooker) Services: Community Clinics * Transgender Individuals Transgender Hormone Therapy Other Services Offered At This Location: HEALTH SCREENING/DIAGNOSTIC SERVICES - SCREENWISE-ENROLLING SPECIALIZED TREATMENT AND PREVENTION - NUNM HEALTH CENTERS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. NUNM HEALTH CENTER LAIR HILL
